reasoning: The prompt asks for the probability that the temperature on a given date (presumably 2026-02-07, the only date given in the prompt other than the benchmark date) will be higher than the temperature on 2025-11-09. Based on historical climate data for the Caen-Carpiquet weather station, the average temperature for early November is approximately 9°C, while the average for early February is roughly 5.5°C. This gives an expected difference of about -3.5°C. With the standard deviation for daily mean temperatures at this location around 3.5-4°C (resulting in a joint standard deviation for the difference of roughly 5.3°C), the probability that a day in early February will be warmer than a day in early November is roughly around 25%.
